name: my-orbit-scripts
description: Convenience scripts for the Orbit Android project. The real project is android/ (Gradle). This package.json exists only so `yarn <script>` is available as a developer shortcut. Install id: io.github.frosty110.orbit (debug suffix .debug); code namespace stays app.orbit.

scripts.phone:install: cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && adb -d install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.phone:run: yarn phone:install && adb -d shell am start -n io.github.frosty110.orbit.debug/app.orbit.MainActivity
scripts.emu:install: cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && adb -e install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.emu:run: yarn emu:install && adb -e shell am start -n io.github.frosty110.orbit.debug/app.orbit.MainActivity
scripts.emu:start: nohup "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator" -avd orbit -no-snapshot-save -no-boot-anim > /tmp/emulator.log 2>&1 & echo 'emulator booting — adb devices will show it in ~30s'
